title: Derived slip signal (overdue / on-track)
description:
Compute the slip signal from target_date + descendant status — DERIVED, never stored (design §4). overdue = past target_date with >=1 open leaf descendant; on-track = has target_date, not past; undated = no signal. Reuses the rollup from T2.

Files: NEW internal/query/slip.go.
acceptance_criteria: slip unit tests: overdue when past target_date with an open descendant; on-track when dated and not past; no signal when undated
closed_reason: Completed: Slip(t, allTicks, now) derived overdue/on_track/none in internal/query/slip.go; deterministic (now param)
